title: The Maya Calendar: The Long Count and the World Ages
description: The Maya calendar system — the most sophisticated in the ancient world. The Long Count measures time from a creation date of August 11, 3114 BCE.
introduction: The Maya calendar system — the most sophisticated in the ancient world. The Long Count measures time from a creation date of August 11, 3114 BCE.

translation.text: The current creation began on 4 Ahau 8 Cumku — the day the gods set the three stones of the cosmic hearth and raised the sky. Before this creation, there were three previous worlds, each destroyed. We live in the fourth world.
